raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command that lists names of bind functions containing "p". In bash, bind -p lists key bindings. We need to filter names containing "p". Use grep. So: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+?='? Actually bind -p outputs like: "\C-a": beginning-of-line. We want function names? Maybe key names? Let's just output names containing p: grep -oP '\w+'? Simpler: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. But that may duplicate. Maybe: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep -i p. Provide command.

Simpler: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. But that may duplicate. Maybe: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep -i p. Provide command.
